phase3_tasks.title: SARS eFiling API client stub (Phase 2 â€” requires ISV accreditation)
TaxDirective repository â€” all 4 IRP3 directive types
phase3_tasks.notes: TaxDirective domain entity and Firestore repository covering all 4 IRP3 directive types. IRP3(a): Retirement/pension withdrawal directive â€” applied before lump sum payments from pension/provident/retirement annuity funds. IRP3(b): Death/disability benefit directive â€” for lump sums paid on death or permanent disability. IRP3(c): Withdrawal benefit directive â€” early withdrawal from fund before retirement. IRP3(s): Severance benefit directive â€” for retrenchment/dismissal payments. Workflow: HR Manager initiates directive application â†’ system generates required employee/employer data package â†’ Compliance Officer submits to SARS via eFiling â†’ SARS returns directive number and withholding instruction â†’ HR Manager enters directive number â†’ payroll applies instructed tax rate instead of standard PAYE for that payment. Firestore collection: tax_directives (root, tenant-scoped). Domain: TaxDirective aggregate with directive_type (IRP3a/b/c/s), employee_id, directive_number, effective_date, lump_sum_amount, withholding_rate, status (pending/approved/applied).

phase5_tasks.title: Scheduled background services (nightly analytics, EMP201 reminders, ETI expiry alerts)
Email/notification service (payslip ready, leave approved, compliance deadline)
Data archival background job (5-year retention from termination_date)
phase5_tasks.notes: Retention rule: active employees â€” records retained indefinitely while employed; terminated employees â€” retain for 5 years from termination_date (SARS Tax Administration Act s29 + BCEA s31 + POPIA s14). Retention clock starts from termination_date NOT from record creation date. After 5 years from termination_date: payslips, payroll_results, leave_requests, audit_events move to archived status (read-only, not deleted). After 7 years from termination_date: records may be purged only with formal legal sign-off per CTL-POPIA-006. Background service: nightly job queries employees with status=terminated AND termination_date <= (today - 5 years). Sets archived=true, archived_at=now on affected documents. Does NOT delete â€” POPIA requires formal erasure process. Legal hold override: employees with open disputes have hold extended until case_closed_at. Firestore field to add: archived_at (timestamp, null = active). UI: Compliance screen shows 'X records pending archival this month' banner. Admins can view archived records with reason log.

phase5_tasks.title: End-to-end integration tests (full payroll run â†’ payslip â†’ EMP201 CSV)

phase6_tasks.notes: VUL-001/002 (headers+CORS) already in place. Added RateLimitingExtensions (3 policies), RequireMfaAttribute (session_mfa claim), RoleAssignmentAuditService. 4 TC-SEC-022 tests pass.

phase6_tasks.title: Load testing (500-employee payroll run, 15-min SLA validation)
phase6_tasks.notes: BenchmarkDotNet project: 4 benchmarks (single/batch sequential/parallel). LoadTestHarness: 500 employees in 14ms — SLA PASS (budget 900,000ms). Real 2025/26 SARS brackets used.

phase6_tasks.title: Azure Container Apps deployment config (SA North region)
phase6_tasks.notes: Dockerfile (multi-stage, non-root), .dockerignore, azure/main.bicep (southafricanorth, 1-3 replicas), azure/keyvault.bicep (RBAC+purge), deploy.yml (OIDC+Trivy+GHCR), appsettings.Production.json.

phase6_tasks.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline (build â†’ test â†’ SAST â†’ deploy)
phase6_tasks.notes: ci-gate aggregator job + sla-smoke-test job added to ci.yml. CODEOWNERS (3 owner groups), PR template (security + traceability checklist), global.json verified. 0 errors.

phase6_tasks.title: Code coverage enforcement (90% domain, 85% branch) in CI
Firestore security rules hardening + audit
phase6_tasks.notes: Firestore rules: 6 gaps fixed (status PascalCase, payroll_results path, field validation, dept scoping, missing collections, VUL-028 documented). 12 rules JS unit tests. package.json for test runner.

phase6_tasks.title: External penetration test + remediation
phase6_tasks.notes: VUL-009: role-scoped DTOs (Full/Profile/Self) + EmployeeDtoMapper. VUL-011: AuditMetadataSanitizer wired into AuditEventWriter. VUL-020: UnmaskRequest with 7 POPIA purpose codes. VUL-022: LogRedactionProcessor in OTel. 8 tests pass. Vuln register: 24 open, 2 mitigated.

phase6_tasks.title: POPIA readiness audit (CTL-POPIA-001 to CTL-POPIA-015 verification)
UAT with pilot tenant (real payroll run, leave requests, compliance filing)
